So, what about the brains behind the Unitary Fund, William Zeng, what is he all about?

That he has managed to set up the fund, as well as work for one of the most famous investment banks on the planet, are two massive feathers in his cap alone, yet his Ph.D. from the University of Oxford in computer science and his real-world experience as head of product at leading QC company Rigetti Computing sets him apart from many of his contemporaries.
